title: Onchain量能筛选器
summary: DEXScreener链上筛选：流动性+市值+短时量能过滤，条件达成自动推送，去重防刷
input_schema: filter_set: {min_liquidity, min_mcap, max_mcap, max_age_hours, min_vol_3m, min_vol_5m}
output_schema: list of tokens passing all filters, sorted by 5m volume desc
trigger_pattern: onchain filter 链上筛选 量能 volume filter dexscreener scan 3分钟 5分钟
generic_steps: 逐个获取pair数据 (流动性/市值/volume/txns)
按filter_set过滤: liquidity, mcap范围, age, 3m/5m量能
去重: _onchain_alerted.json记录已推送地址(24h过期)
只推送新token，避免重复告警
template_code:
oc_tokens = await scan_onchain_filter(ONCHAIN_FILTER_SET_1)
new_tokens = onchain_filter_new_only(oc_tokens)
report = format_onchain_filter_report(new_tokens)
